activeWork.description: MOAT spec finalization: resolved issue #8 revocation mechanism; locked decisions 3–5; fixed OWASP alignment; updated repo metadata and README
activeWork.progress: Issue #8 revocation fully designed and documented in working outline. Decisions 3–5 stress-tested and locked: (3) compromised as hard block, (4) unreachable feed fails open with requirements, (5) revoked_at registry-asserted with no skew. Bug fixed (removed contradiction). OWASP alignment cleaned (CICD-SEC-3 removed, AST09 added). Open issues #9–#14 well-scoped for future work. Repo description and README completely updated. All changes pushed.

recentDecisions: Decision 3: compromised status is hard block with no override
Decision 4: unreachable feed fails open with URL + staleness + last-fetch timestamp
Decision 5: revoked_at is registry-asserted, no skew window
Repo one-liner: 'A protocol for publishing AI agent content through signed registries with cryptographic provenance'
Added moat-spec.md pointer to docs/mote-revised-outline.md (live working version link)
nextSteps: Resume syllago work OR tackle MOAT open issues #10–#14 (publisher auth, federation security, algorithm deprecation, offline verification, blocklist federation)
